requirements.notes: The codec now formats and parses the type-only PADDING frame as a single-byte, no-content frame.

requirements.remaining_gap: Using PADDING to enlarge packets requires packet assembly policy that the current repo does not expose.
requirements.notes: The codec can emit a PADDING frame, but packet size management remains outside this slice.

requirements.remaining_gap: Initial-packet minimum-size enforcement needs packet construction and handshake packet shaping.
requirements.notes: This requirement belongs to packet assembly rather than frame byte encoding.

requirements.remaining_gap: Using ECN feedback to manage congestion state requires a congestion controller and ACK processing state.
requirements.notes: The codec only parses and formats the ECN counters.

requirements.remaining_gap: Remembering acknowledgments across frames requires ACK state tracking by packet number space.
requirements.notes: No packet-history model exists in this repo yet.

requirements.remaining_gap: Packet number space handling is missing from the current frame-only surface.
requirements.notes: The codec does not model Initial, Handshake, or Application packet number spaces.

requirements.remaining_gap: An acknowledgment cannot be bound to a packet number space without surrounding packet context.
requirements.notes: Packet context is outside this codec slice.

requirements.remaining_gap: Rejecting ACKs for Version Negotiation and Retry packets requires packet-type integration.
requirements.notes: The frame codec does not inspect enclosing packet headers.

requirements.remaining_gap: Abruptly terminating the sending part of a stream requires a stream state machine.
requirements.notes: This slice only proves RESET_STREAM wire encoding and decoding.

requirements.remaining_gap: Discarding received stream data is receiver-side stream-buffer behavior outside the codec.
requirements.notes: No stream receive buffer model exists here.

requirements.notes: That enforcement belongs to a later stream-state layer.
